subcodes.first_line: Praise and glorification, thanksgiving and exaltation befit the Lord of the Kingdom of Names, Who through His grace and bounty hath created the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد و ثنا شکر و سنا مالک ملکوت اسماء را لایق و سزاست که عالم را محض فضل و عطا
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @stories; anecdotes
